name: Sun Ce (Bofu)
page_title: Sun Ce (Bofu) 孫策 (伯符) [Yuan Shu, Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
ranks: Colonel Who Breaks the Enemy Lines, General Who Destroys the Criminals
General Who Exterminates the Rebels, Marquis of Wu
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Sun Ce did not give the Imperial Seal to Yuan Shu, nor did he ever have the Seal in his possession.
	Sun Ce never allied with Yuan Shao to attack Cao Cao.
	It’s highly debatable whether or not Sun Ce killed the mystic Gan Ji.
	Sun Ce was not harassed to death by the mystic Gan Ji.

full_text:
Sun Ce (Bofu) 孫策 (伯符)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Ce (孫策), styledBofu (伯符), was born in Fu Chun County, Wu Prefecture (Presently Fu Yang in Zhe Jiang Province). Sun Jian’s oldest son. Built the foundation of the Wu kingdom. Sun Ce was affiliated with Yuan Shu and the Wu Kingdom. Sun Ce lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Sun Ce did not give the Imperial Seal to Yuan Shu, nor did he ever have the Seal in his possession.
Sun Ce never allied with Yuan Shao to attack Cao Cao.
It’s highly debatable whether or not Sun Ce killed the mystic Gan Ji.
Sun Ce was not harassed to death by the mystic Gan Ji.
